description: Maps topics to relevant page images for the agent to serve when answering questions. The agent should surface these images when a question touches the listed topics or keywords.

front_panel_layout.description: Labeled diagram of all front panel controls: Home/Back buttons, Control/Left/Right Knobs, LCD Display, Power Switch, MIG Gun socket, Positive/Negative sockets, Wire Feed Power Cable, Spool Gun Gas Outlet, Storage Compartment

interior_controls.description: Labeled diagram of interior: Wire Spool, Spool Knob, Wire Feed Mechanism, Wire Inlet Liner, Cold Wire Feed Switch, Feed Tensioner, Idler Arm, Feed Roller Knob, Foot Pedal Socket, Wire Feed Control Socket

polarity_mig_dcep.description: DCEP setup for MIG: Ground Clamp in Negative socket, Wire Feed Power Cable in Positive socket. Gas cylinder connection steps.

polarity_flux_dcen.description: DCEN setup for Flux-Cored: Ground Clamp in Positive socket, Wire Feed Power Cable in Negative socket. No gas needed.

polarity_tig.description: TIG setup: Ground Clamp in Positive, TIG Torch in Negative, Foot Pedal in Foot Pedal Socket, Shielding Gas Hose to TIG Torch connector.

polarity_stick.description: Stick setup: Ground Clamp in Negative, Electrode Holder in Positive. No gas, no wire feed.

polarity_all_processes.description: Quick Start Guide page 2: side-by-side cable setup photos for all 4 processes (Stick, MIG, Flux, TIG)

wire_spool_installation.description: Wire spool installation for both 1-2 lb and 10-12 lb spools with labeled diagrams

feed_roller_selection.description: Feed Roller types: V-Groove (solid core) vs Knurled Groove (flux-cored), with wire diameter markings

wire_threading_and_tension.description: Wire threading through liner, tensioner latching, cold wire feed procedure, drive tension test (2-3 inches against wood block)

gun_cable_connector.description: Correct vs incorrect Gun Cable Connector insertion into Wire Feed mechanism

gas_cylinder_setup.description: Gas cylinder mounting, valve cleaning, regulator connection, gas hose to welder

duty_cycle_mig.description: MIG duty cycle visual: 120V 40%@100A (4min weld/6min rest), 100%@75A. 240V 25%@200A (2.5min/7.5min), 100%@115A.

settings_mig.description: MIG LCD settings walkthrough: process selection, wire diameter, material thickness, auto weld WFS/voltage, optional settings (Run-In WFS, Inductance, Spot Timer, Recall/Save)

settings_tig.description: TIG LCD settings: process selection, 100% Argon, rod diameter, material thickness, amperage, ON/OFF torch

settings_stick.description: Stick LCD settings: process, electrode type (60xx/70xx), electrode diameter, material thickness, amperage, Hot Start, Arc Force

welding_technique_wire.description: Wire welding technique: stringer vs weave bead, 90° butt / 45° fillet angles, push angle (MIG) vs drag angle (flux-cored), CTWD up to 1/2 inch

electrode_grinding_torch_assembly.description: Tungsten electrode sharpening technique and TIG torch exploded assembly view (Back Cap, Collet, Collet Body, Ceramic Nozzle)

weld_diagnosis_wire.description: Wire weld diagnosis: cross-section penetration diagrams, 6 example weld photos (good, voltage low/high, speed fast/slow, CTWD/polarity wrong), porosity, spatter, crooked bead, burn-through

weld_diagnosis_stick.description: Stick weld diagnosis: cross-section penetration, 7 example weld photos (good, current low/high, speed fast/slow, arc length short/long), porosity, spatter, burn-through

strike_test.description: Strike test procedure (hammer test: good weld bends, poor weld snaps) and weld cleaning with chipping hammer and wire brush

wiring_schematic.description: Full electrical wiring schematic: AC input, rectifier bridge, PFC, IGBT inverter, MCU Board, Remote Board, LCD Screen, Wire Feeder motor, Solenoid Valves, Fans

assembly_exploded.description: Exploded isometric assembly diagram with 61 numbered callouts matching the parts list

parts_list.description: 61-item parts list table with part numbers, descriptions, and quantities

maintenance.description: Maintenance: pre-use inspection checklist, MIG Gun Nozzle/Contact Tip cleaning (9 steps), LCD Screen Cover replacement

settings_chart_door.description: Photo of the Settings Chart printed on inside of welder door — quick reference for all process settings, duty cycles, wire spool setup, and wire feed setup

selection_chart.description: Welding process selection decision chart: skill level, gas requirements, materials, thickness ranges, applications, weld cleanliness for Flux-Cored, MIG, Stick, TIG

quick_start_overview.description: 6-step quick start visual poster for first-time setup

spool_gun_setup.description: Optional Spool Gun setup: Ground Clamp in Negative, Wire Feed Power in Positive, Spool Gun Cable through MIG Gun socket, Gas Hose to Spool Gun Gas Outlet

overheating_warning.description: LCD warning screen showing problem/remedy for Duty Cycle Exceeded, Low Voltage Input, High Voltage Input. Post-welding procedures.
